main_screen_rendering.description: Main screen renders with all required UI elements and features
goals: All rendering tests pass including sidebar, chat interface, session state
Dark mode toggle available in settings

constraint_all_tests_pass.description: Behavioral: all main screen rendering tests must pass

superset_schema_validation.description: Validate superset.k.json structure: sections have tags, descriptions, and question children with q1-qN keys
goals: All top-level children must have metadata.tags with comma-separated keywords
All top-level children must have description
All top-level children must have nested children (q1, q2, q3, etc.)
All question children must have label and description

constraint_sections_have_tags.cmd: test -f $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json && children=$(jq '.children // {}' $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json | jq 'length') && test "$children" -gt 0 || { echo 'No sections found'; exit 1; }; invalid=$(jq '[.children // {} | to_entries[] | select(.value.metadata == null or .value.metadata.tags == null or .value.metadata.tags == "") | .key] | length' $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json); test "$invalid" -eq 0 || { echo 'Sections without tags found'; exit 1; }
constraint_sections_have_tags.description: Structural: all sections must have metadata.tags (comma-separated)

constraint_sections_have_description.cmd: test -f $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json && children=$(jq '.children // {}' $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json | jq 'length') && test "$children" -gt 0 || { echo 'No sections found'; exit 1; }; invalid=$(jq '[.children // {} | to_entries[] | select(.value.description == null or .value.description == "") | .key] | length' $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json); test "$invalid" -eq 0 || { echo 'Sections without description found'; exit 1; }
constraint_sections_have_description.description: Structural: all sections must have non-empty description

constraint_sections_have_children.cmd: test -f $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json && sections=$(jq '.children // {}' $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json | jq 'length') && test "$sections" -gt 0 || { echo 'No sections found'; exit 1; }; invalid=$(jq '[.children // {} | to_entries[] | select(.value.children == null or (.value.children | length == 0)) | .key] | length' $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json); test "$invalid" -eq 0 || { echo 'Sections without children found'; exit 1; }
constraint_sections_have_children.description: Structural: all sections must have nested children (questions)

constraint_questions_q_format.cmd: test -f $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json && sections=$(jq '.children // {}' $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json | jq 'length') && test "$sections" -gt 0 || { echo 'No sections found'; exit 1; }; invalid=$(jq '[.children // {} | to_entries[] | .value.children // {} | to_entries[] | select(.key | test("^q[0-9]+$") | not) | .key] | length' $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json); test "$invalid" -eq 0 || { echo 'Invalid question keys found'; exit 1; }
constraint_questions_q_format.description: Structural: all question keys must match q[0-9]+ format (q1, q2, q3...)

constraint_questions_have_label_descript.cmd: test -f $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json && sections=$(jq '.children // {}' $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json | jq 'length') && test "$sections" -gt 0 || { echo 'No sections found'; exit 1; }; invalid=$(jq '[.children // {} | to_entries[] | .value.children // {} | to_entries[] | select(.value.label == null or .value.label == "" or .value.description == null or .value.description == "") | .key] | length' $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json); test "$invalid" -eq 0 || { echo 'Questions missing label or description found'; exit 1; }
constraint_questions_have_label_descript.description: Structural: all questions must have non-empty label and description

constraint_toc_enabled.cmd: toc_enabled=$(jq '.opts.render_toc' $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json); test "$toc_enabled" = "true" || { echo 'TOC not enabled'; exit 1; }
constraint_toc_enabled.description: Structural: render_toc must be enabled in opts

constraint_questions_have_tags.cmd: test -f $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json && sections=$(jq '.children // {} | length' $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json) && test "$sections" -gt 0 || { echo 'No sections found'; exit 1; }; invalid=$(jq '[.children // {} | to_entries[] | .value.children // {} | to_entries[] | select(.value.metadata == null or .value.metadata.tags == null or .value.metadata.tags == "") | .key] | length' $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json); test "$invalid" -eq 0 || { echo 'Questions without tags found'; exit 1; }
constraint_questions_have_tags.description: Structural: all questions (q1-qN) must have metadata.tags (comma-separated keywords)

constraint_tags_format.cmd: test -f $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json && jq '[.children // {} | to_entries[] | ((.value.metadata.tags // "") | split(",") | map(ltrimstr(" ") | rtrimstr(" ")) | map(select(length > 0) | split(" ") | length) | map(select(. > 3))), (.value.children // {} | to_entries[] | ((.value.metadata.tags // "") | split(",") | map(ltrimstr(" ") | rtrimstr(" ")) | map(select(length > 0) | split(" ") | length) | map(select(. > 3))))] | flatten | length' $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json | grep -q '^0$' || { echo 'Tags with > 3 words found'; exit 1; }
constraint_tags_format.description: Format: each tag (comma-separated) must have at most 3 words (e.g., 'system-design' OK, 'system design interview' NOT OK)

constraint_questions_have_mermaid.cmd: test -f $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json && sections=$(jq '.children // {}' $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json | jq 'length') && test "$sections" -gt 0 || { echo 'No sections found'; exit 1; }; invalid=$(jq '[.children // {} | to_entries[] | .value.children // {} | to_entries[] | select(.value.metadata == null or .value.metadata.mermaid == null or .value.metadata.mermaid == "") | .key] | length' $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json); test "$invalid" -eq 0 || { echo "Questions without mermaid: $invalid"; exit 1; }
constraint_questions_have_mermaid.description: Structural: all questions must have metadata.mermaid with diagram visualization

constraint_tags_max_one_hyphen.cmd: test -f $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json || { echo 'File not found'; exit 1; }; invalid=$(jq '[.children // {} | to_entries[] | .value.children // {} | to_entries[] | select(.value.metadata.tags != null and .value.metadata.tags != "") | .value.metadata.tags | split(",") | .[] | select((gsub(" +"; "") | split("-") | length) > 2)] | length' $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json); test "$invalid" -eq 0 || { echo "Tags with multiple hyphens: $invalid"; exit 1; }
constraint_tags_max_one_hyphen.description: Format: each tag (separated by comma) must have max one hyphen (parent-child format)

metadata_keys_standardization.description: Standardize metadata keys: only metadata.code allowed, no separate language keys
goals: Only metadata.code is supported for code content
No separate metadata keys for individual languages (python, javascript, rust, go, cpp, c, yaml, js, py, cc)
Superset.k.json contains no separate language metadata keys

constraint_no_separate_language_keys.cmd: test -f $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json && invalid=$(jq '[.children // {} | to_entries[] | .value.children // {} | to_entries[] | select(.value.metadata != null) | .value.metadata | keys[] | select(. == "python" or . == "javascript" or . == "rust" or . == "go" or . == "cpp" or . == "c" or . == "yaml" or . == "js" or . == "py" or . == "cc" or . == "code_python" or . == "code_javascript" or . == "code_rust" or . == "code_go" or . == "code_cpp" or . == "code_c")] | length' $PROJECT_ROOT/prep/superset.k.json) && test "$invalid" -eq 0 || { echo "Found separate language keys"; exit 1; }
constraint_no_separate_language_keys.description: Structural: no separate language metadata keys allowed (only metadata.code)

constraint_app_handles_only_code.cmd: grep -q "metadata.get(code)" $PROJECT_ROOT/app/interview_prep_app.py && ! grep -q "for lang in.*python.*javascript" $PROJECT_ROOT/app/interview_prep_app.py || { echo "App should only handle metadata.code"; exit 1; }
constraint_app_handles_only_code.description: Behavioral: app must only render metadata.code, not separate language keys
